synopsis: Star Wars: Starfighter: Crossbones was a three-issue series of comics published by Dark Horse Comics between January 9, 2002 and March 13, 2002. It is set in 24 BBY. This spin-off was based on the successful video game Star Wars: Starfighter. This series has not been collected as a trade paperback, but was eventually collected in Star Wars Omnibus: Menace Revealed. It tells the story of the pirate captain Nym and his hunt of his nemesis Sol Sixxa on the planet Maramere.
title: Starfighter: Crossbones
